use_cases: Primary CTA button for retro or arcade-themed websites
Interactive button with elastic hover animations and flickering effects
Call-to-action for gaming, entertainment, or creative portfolio sites
Engaging interactive element for marketing landing pages
Gaming-inspired UI component for modern web applications
ai_summary: A retro-styled button component featuring GSAP-powered elastic animations, SVG flickering effects, and delayed text color transitions on hover. The button combines nostalgic arcade aesthetics with modern animation techniques, including elastic bounce effects on bar elements and a glow shadow that activates on hover. Designed as a highly engaging interactive element suitable for gaming, entertainment, or creative portfolio contexts.
